subcodes.first_line: O thou who art redolent with the divine fragrances! Thy letter hath been received, and due to the endless press of matters, a brief reply is herewith written [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشکین الهی نامه شما رسید از کثرت مشاغل بی پایان مختصر جواب مرقوم میگردد
subcodes.subjects: @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
